calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
HARVEY MAXEY FOR PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT NCUA BASEBALL WITH WITNESS DAN RUMPFF
ANNA LOUIE FOR DEFENDANT/APPELLANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA UMPIRES ASSOCIATION - NCUA

The cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. The clerk administers the oath to all parties and witnesses.

Parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.
The case is submitted for decision.

The Court having considered the evidence presented and testimony of the parties and witness, finds in favor of Appellant/Defendant Northern California Umpires Association - NCUA and against Respondent/Plaintiff NCUA Baseball. The Small Claims Judgment of July 14, 2021 is reversed. Each party to bear its own costs.

Judge Garrett L. Wong, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (504)
